title: ZHDC Evening Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Zakir Husain Delhi College (ZHDC Evening) Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of Zakir Husain Delhi College. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ZHDC Evening Nurse Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing / B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) OR Diploma in General Nursing and midwifery. Registered Nurse with State Nursing Council. Minimum 6 months to 1 year experience in a 50-bedded hospital.
qualification.details: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing from a recognized University or Institute OR Regular Course in B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized University or Institute OR Post Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) from recognized University or Institute. Registered as Nurse or Nurse and Midwife (RN or RN and RM) with State Nursing Council. Six months experience in a minimum 50 bedded hospital after acquiring the educational qualification. OR Diploma in General Nursing and midwifery from a recognized Board or Council. Registered as Nurse or Nurse and midwifery (RN or RN and RM) with State Nursing Council. One year experience in a minimum 50 bedded hospital after acquiring the educational qualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post being advertised by Zakir Husain Delhi College?
faq.answer: Zakir Husain Delhi College is recruiting for the post of Nurse on a contract basis. This is a walk-in recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Nurse position at Zakir Husain Delhi College.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Nurse post is scheduled for 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing or equivalent, or a Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery, along with registration and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Nurse position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Nurse post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Nurse role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25500 Per Month plus Dearness Allowance.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview and a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The exact venue details will be available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the notification for the precise location.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).
